---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[REQUEST]"
labels: documentation, enhancement, question
assignees: ''

---

# 💡 Feature Request

Thanks for thinking of ways to make this better! Fill in what you can. 😊

---

## 📍 Which app is this for?

<!-- Tick the one(s) that apply -->

- [ ] 📝 Blog (`/blog`)
- [ ] 🎨 Emotes (`/emotes`)
- [ ] 📡 Feeds (`/feeds`)
- [ ] 📎 File Host (`/filehost`)
- [ ] 💬 IRC (`/irc`)
- [ ] 📋 NoPaste (`/nopaste`)
- [ ] 🏠 Main page / other
- [ ] 🆕 A brand new app entirely

---

## 😤 Is This Related to a Problem?

<!-- Is there something frustrating or broken about the current experience?
     e.g. "I'm always frustrated when I can't export my Blog posts..." -->



---

## ✨ Describe the Feature You'd Like

<!-- A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.
     The more specific, the better! -->



---

## 🔄 Alternatives You've Considered

<!-- Have you thought of other ways to solve this?
     Even if they didn't work out, it's useful to know. -->



---

## 🎯 Why Would This Be Useful?

<!-- Who benefits from this? Just you, or others too?
     e.g. "This would help anyone who uses File Host + Feeds together." -->



---

## 📸 Screenshots / Mockups

<!-- Got a sketch, screenshot, or example from another app?
     Drag and drop it here — even a rough idea helps! -->



---

## 🗂️ Additional Context

<!-- Anything else worth mentioning? Links, references, related issues, etc. -->
